channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rafael Nadal will play Davis Cup singles for Spain against the Netherlands ahead of retirement
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal was picked to play singles for Spain against the Netherlands on Tuesday at the Davis Cup Final 8, the 22-time Grand Slam champion's last event before he retires.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans
item.description: A piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a 34-10 loss to Houston on Monday night, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Paul-Tyson ring girl Sydney Thomas recalls 'once in a lifetime opportunity,' reveals how she got her start
item.description: Ring girl Sydney Thomas was a showstopper during the Jake Paul and Mike Tyson fight on Friday night. She opened about her newfound fame with her followers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah State women's volleyball star applauds school as it seeks to be added to Mountain West lawsuit
item.description: Utah State women's volleyball star Kylie Ray applauded her school as it sought to enter as a plaintiff in a lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ovechkin scores twice as Washington beats Utah, 6-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - One of the joys of having an NHL team is to watch the game's greatest players come to Salt Lake City. On Monday, the great Alex Ovechkin put on a show for the Utah Hockey Club fans.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ex-NBA stars Carter, McGrady part of group seeking to buy stake in Buffalo Bills, AP source says
item.description: Former NBA stars Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady are part of a group being considered by the NFL to purchase a non-controlling minority stake in the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow And Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US soccer star Christian Pulisic nails Trump's dance move after goal
item.description: U.S. men's soccer star Christian Pulisic scored a goal in a Nations League match against Jamaica and immediately broke out President-elect Donald Trump's dance move.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PGA Tour approves reduction to 100 players keeping cards off FedEx Cup list
item.description: The PGA Tour policy board approved eligibility changes Monday that eliminate 25 cards through the FedEx Cup in the first reduction of jobs since the all-exempt tour began in 1983. Starting in 2026, only the top 100 in the FedEx Cup are assured full status the following year.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Giants bench Daniel Jones, give nod to Tommy DeVito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The Giants did exactly what you expected today in one respect, they benched starter Daniel Jones, and in doing so, his days as a member of the Giants franchise are over. Who will be the starter on Sunday against Tampa Bay? Jersey's own, Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Debris falls from roof at home of Cowboys before game against Texans; no injuries reported
item.description: Officials say a piece of the roof at the home of the Dallas Cowboys fell to the field while the retractable portion of it was being opened at least three hours before a game against Houston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Another Lakers legend to receive statue outside arena
item.description: One of the winningest coaches in NBA history will forever be enshrined in downtown Los Angeles when the Lakers unveil the newest statue on Star Plaza outside Crypto.com Arena.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump dance takes over sports world
item.description: Supporters of President-elect Donald Trump have been paying homage on the gridiron and inside the octagon in recent days.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Lions' Dan Campbell addresses 'bizarre' criticism about taking out starters in blowouts
item.description: Detroit Lions head coach Dan Campbell spoke Sunday after his decision-making process for taking out starters in the midst of blowouts after their latest win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appears to break out Trump's dance move during tournament
item.description: English LPGA Tour star Charley Hull appeared to join the line of professional athletes who pulled off President-elect Donald Trump's dance move over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chargers beat Bengals 34-27 on Dobbins' late TD after squandering 21-point lead
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Jim Harbaugh and the Los Angeles Chargers finally have their signature win. Even if it ended up being a white-knuckle finish. The Chargers squandered a 21-point third-quarter lead Sunday night against the Cincinnati Bengals before J.K.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Denver Broncos def. Atlanta Falcons 38-6
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Bo Nix made a statement Sunday, playing like a seasoned veteran despite his rookie status. The Broncos quarterback set career highs in passing yards, touchdowns, and completion percentage as Denver cruised to a decisive 38-6 victory over the Falcons.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Sengun records triple-double, VanVleet scores 28 in Rockets 143-107 rout of Bulls
item.description: Fred VanVleet scored a season-high 28 points, Alperen Sengun had 20 points, 11 rebounds and 11 assists for his second triple-double this season and the Houston Rockets routed the Chicago Bulls 143-107 on Sunday night for their fifth straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz unable to hold fourth quarter lead in loss to Kings
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring 60 points in a losing effort the night before, De'Aaron Fox scored 49 points to lead the Sacramento Kings to a 121-117 win over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jake Paul, 27, beats 58-year-old Mike Tyson as the hits don't match the hype
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The boos from a crowd wanting more action were growing again when Jake Paul dropped his gloves before the final bell and bowed toward 58-year-old Mike Tyson.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: PREVIEW: GJ Tigers football in round 2 of the playoffs vs. Ponderosa
item.description: For the first time since 2011, it is mid-November and the Grand Junction Tigers are still practicing football.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jump around: Cavaliers improve to 14-0, celebrate by dancing with frog mascot
item.description: They continued their perfect start, improving to 14-0 on Friday night with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls in an NBA Cup opener that served as another showcase for a Cavs team clicking like never before.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bird, Fowles, Pondexter, Beard headline Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025
item.description: WNBA greats Sue Bird, Sylvia Fowles, Cappie Pondexter and Alana Beard headline the Women's Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2025 that was announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mike Tyson concedes the role of villain to young foe in 58-year-old's fight with Jake Paul
item.description: Friendship is at the heart of how a fight came together between 58-year-old former heavyweight champion Mike Tyson and much younger YouTuber-turned-boxer Jake Paul.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vasilevskiy stars as the Lightning stop the Jets' 7-game win streak with a 4-1 victory
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 24 saves in his 300th NHL win, and the Tampa Bay Lightning stopped Winnipeg’s seven-game win streak with a 4-1 victory over the Jets. Vasilevskiy is the 40th goaltender in league history to win 300 games.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Curry upset after Klay 'ghosted' him before game, Draymond Green says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- While it seemed to be all sunshine and roses inside Chase Center as the packed arena welcomed back Klay Thompson on Tuesday, that wasn't exactly the case -- at least amongst the players on the court.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
